- [ ] 🎨 Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist

<!-- Verify everything is complete before requesting review -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented complex or non-obvious code
- [ ] I have updated corresponding documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix works or my feature does what it says
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes without errors
- [ ] `bun run check-types` passes without errors
- [ ] `bun run build` completes successfully
